key_drivers: Real yields falling sharply (DFII10: 2.13% to 1.97%, down 16bps in week) - primary bullish driver for gold, equities, and rate-sensitive assets
Iran war driving geopolitical premium in oil (WTI $111.54) and safe-haven demand in gold ($4,676/oz); MOVE index down 26.6% in 5 days suggests market pricing in de-escalation
BoJ hawkish pivot with 70% April hike probability driving JPY strength; credit spreads narrowing (HY OAS 3.46 to 3.17) supporting risk assets broadly

stale_sources: Gold ETF Flows (February 2026 monthly report; March data not yet published by World Gold Council)
fallbacks_used: Gold ETF flows assessed via news reports (SSGA Monthly Gold Monitor, ETFdb, ainvest) - net assessment: flat/mixed
